{{CargoRelic
|name=Magellan's Telescope
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|birthday=02-03
|source=Grandmaster Scroll (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.09%)
|description=On Feb 3, AD 1519, Magellan entered the Pacific Ocean using this telescope.

Magellan had been trapped in South America for several months. His route was blocked, so he had to find another way. He discovered a narrow strait in the north, with rough water and mountain peaks on both sides. A group of penguins appeared, filing by in a long line, crossing between the mountains and glaciers. Magellan believed that there must be a way out ahead. After sailing for three months, he entered the Pacific Ocean. 

[Magellan Voyage Route]

Starting Point: Europe, then to Atlantic, to Strait of Magellan, to Pacific, to Indian Ocean, to Cape of Good Hope, to Atlantic, to Europe
|fame=108
|art=48
|fth=70
|civ=69
|tech=67
|ss1=Travel SPD +0.6%<br>In explorations, B-tads gained +1.2%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +1.8%
|ss2=Travel SPD +0.8%<br>In explorations, B-tads gained +1.6%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +2.4%
|ss3=Travel SPD +1%<br>In explorations, B-tads gained +2%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +3%
|ss4=Travel SPD +1.4%<br>In explorations, B-tads gained +2.8%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +4.2%
|ss5=Travel SPD +1.8%<br>In explorations, B-tads gained +3.6%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +5.4%
|ss6=Travel SPD +2.4%<br>In explorations, B-tads gained +4.8%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +7.2%
|ss7=Travel SPD +2.4%<br>In explorations, B-tads gained +4.8%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +7.2%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +6% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: Travel SPD +9%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, B-tads gained +15%
|skill3=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, INTEL gained +15%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|Magellan's Telescope}}
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Orange Relics]]
[[Category:FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Orange FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Travel Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration B-tad Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration INTEL Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
